Azusa PD:  Zebra Fire Advisory

The Zebra Fire remains an active incident, and fire suppression operations continue in the area with ground and air resources assigned. There are currently no evacuation warnings or evacuation orders in effect. Please obey all traffic laws, reduce your speed when traveling near fire operations, and keep roadways clear.
